description: Business letter from Mūsā b. Abū l-Ḥayy in Alexandria to Abū l-Afraḥ Avraham (ʿArūs) b. Yosef in Fustat. The letter contains an accounting for a shipment, perhaps of flax, followed by a list of prices, manly spices and medicaments. Dating: ca. 1080. (Information from Gil, Kingdom)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
